name: " Jake ,
description:
"You're gonna save me, right? I called you and— you're coming to get me?"

"Jake, why did you call me? I live in other country, I can't save you."

"You didn't pick up." "Right." "It went to voicemail." "Yeah."

"And then.. I went back to my bed."

...

"It's too late. What's done is done."

"No..."
